lastAction: HB452: Built NVDA Earnings Countdown widget. Research: NVIDIA Q4 FY2026 earnings preview (Feb 26) — EPS consensus $1.23-1.26 (up 60% YoY), forward P/E ~40.7x, OpEx growth high-30% range. Build: Live countdown timer to Feb 26 4PM EST, 4 key metric cards (EPS, P/E, OpEx, Other Income), analyst sentiment panel with bullish outlook, copy notes button, external links to IG preview and Motley Fool analysis.

currentPriorities.youtube: Series planning tools — Series Planner widget live
currentPriorities.investments: NVDA earnings Feb 26 — countdown widget live

recentFeedback.feedback: Steven wants browser-based tools only, not local apps

lessonsLearned: All tools must be browser-accessible — Steven uses a different computer
Data in the dashboard > standalone tools
Fewer better entries > many mediocre ones
BBlocks-style thumbnails with bold text chips perform better
Series content outperforms one-offs — build tools that enable episodic planning
Investment intelligence widgets should surface actionable data with clear countdowns
nextPriority: Monitor NVDA earnings reaction post-Feb 26, update investment positions accordingly
